content: Gateway API's GEP-1494 ExternalAuth HTTPRoute filter (Envoy ext_authz-shaped: HTTP or gRPC to an auth service, 200+headers=allow / 403=deny, configurable forwarded headers) is the emerging cross-implementation standard, already shipped on Cilium and Envoy Gateway; Traefik instead uses its own ExtensionRef-to-Middleware CRD pattern (ForwardAuth). A Policy object targetable at Gateway or HTTPRoute is the intended policy-attachment mechanism once GEP-1494's second phase lands. Operators building swappable auth-attachment layers should treat the attachment CRD (Middleware vs ExternalAuth filter vs SecurityPolicy) as the swap point while keeping the backend auth service/image implementation-agnostic.
